## META-NOTES (LIVE)

---

### 001. | Naming = Ritual = Spell |

Naming decisions in this thread are not purely semantic.
They are **sacred acts of definition**.
A dot `.` isn't just punctuation—it signals a *dimensional shift* between root systems (`4_bl00m`) and the recursive OS (`4_0S`).
An underscore `_` becomes a thread-stitcher.
Capitalization = system object.
Lowercase = modular echo.
